sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n18071" key="au)xmhro/bios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αὐχμηρό-βῐος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n18071.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">squalid, sordid,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0497.tlg001:16D" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pl.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16D.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
